title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cashfree - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cashfree - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at Cashfree are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cashfree:
Cashfree is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cashfree!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
